MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASPEN SOUTH HILLS APTS. A CALIF. LIMITED PART. COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-19-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY MICHAEL ROSSOFF PRESENT FOR PLTF WITH PROPERTY MGR ELLA HENDERSON. DEFT THEA SLATER PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED; TERMS NOT ON RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED JUDGMNT PURS TO STIP; PARTIES INDICATED UNDERSTANDING & ACCEPTANCE OF CONDITIONS OF SETTLEMENT CONTAINED IN JUDGMNT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SLATER, THEA A. AKA THEA SLATER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 75 REARDON ROAD, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $558.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $558.00, STAYED UNTIL OCT-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E OF EVICTION UNTIL MIDNIGHT 10-15-96. NO FURTHER STAYS. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED. DEFT'S SEC. DEPOSIT OF $500 TO BE RETAINED BY PLTF. MUTUTAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS EXCEPT IN CASE OF BREACH BY DEFT.
